description_long: This restaurant features a traditional architectural style with a prominent red-tiled gabled roof and white plastered walls. The main building is elevated on a stone platform with steps leading up to a welcoming entrance, flanked by decorative lanterns and a wooden overhang. The front facade includes a large window with hanging curtains and a signboard above, suggesting a focus on hospitality and visibility. Adjacent to the main structure is a rustic outdoor area with a wooden shed, hay bales, a well, and a small dock extending into a body of water, evoking a rural or riverside setting. The exterior grounds are grassy with scattered objects such as barrels and carts, adding to the lived-in, functional atmosphere. The overall composition blends commercial and agricultural elements, creating a unique and inviting environment.
description: A traditional restaurant with a red-tiled roof, white walls, and a welcoming entrance, set beside a rustic outdoor area with a shed, hay bales, and a small dock by the water.
description_view_0: Side view showing the restaurant's white walls, red-tiled roof, and the adjacent rustic area with a shed, hay bales, and a dock.
description_view_1: Narrow end view highlighting the shed, well, and cart in the outdoor area, with the restaurant's side and roof visible in the background.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the restaurant's main entrance, large window with curtains, and signboard, as well as the outdoor area with the dock and shed.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the restaurant's roof and the grassy outdoor area, with the water and dock visible to the side.
attribute_signage: A rectangular signboard with white background and black text is mounted above the main entrance window.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features white plastered walls with a prominent red-tiled gabled roof and wooden trim. Decorative lanterns flank the entrance, and a large window with hanging curtains and a signboard above adds visual interest. The overall style is traditional, with rustic elements and a welcoming, homey appearance.
